raw_title: Profit Over Public Good: The Impact of Investment Firm Ownership on Local News and Political Behavior
title_en: Profit Over Public Good: The Impact of Investment Firm Ownership on Local News and Political Behavior
title_zh: 利润高于公共利益：投资公司所有权对地方新闻和政治行为的影响
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了当投资公司拥有地方新闻媒体时，它们如何优先考虑利润而非公共利益，以及这如何影响当地社区的政治行为。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how investment firms owning local news media prioritize profit over public good, and how this affects political behavior in local communities.
research_direction_zh: 研究媒体所有权结构对新闻内容质量和民主参与的影响，特别是在地方层面。
research_direction_en: Investigating how media ownership structures affect news content quality and democratic engagement, particularly at the local level.
